mapper.sql: a.id as id, a.addtime as addtime, a.qiantaizhanghao as qiantaizhanghao, a.mima as mima, a.qiantaixingming as qiantaixingming, a.xingbie as xingbie, a.shouji as shouji, a.ruzhishijian as ruzhishijian, a.zhaopian as zhaopian, a.zhuangtai as zhuangtai
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM qiantairenyuan a WHERE a.qiantaizhanghao = #{qiantaizhanghao} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM qiantairenyuan a WHERE a.shouji = #{shouji} LIMIT 1
